markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 601. Motor Vehicle Safety Responsibility Act
##### § 601.165 — Custody of Cash Security

The department shall place cash deposited in compliance with this subchapter in the custody of the comptroller.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995. Amended by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 1423, Sec. 18.11, eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*

subsections.text: The department shall place cash deposited in compliance with this subchapter in the custody of the comptroller.
